sources: AWS SIEM on Amazon OpenSearch Service (github.com/aws-samples/siem-on-amazon-opensearch-service)
meta.description: Registry of security dashboards, layout elements, and components WITHOUT actual data. Use for dashboard generation, compliance automation, and security operations planning.
meta.schema_note: All data_source fields are references only. No live data is included.

dashboards.name: Security Overview
dashboards.description: High-level overview of security posture with alert trends, event histograms, threat intelligence, and live feed of cases and timelines.

dashboards.name: Detection & Response
dashboards.description: Day-to-day operations view for detection alerts, cases, and host/user associations.

dashboards.name: Cloud Security Posture
dashboards.description: Cloud infrastructure compliance against CIS security benchmarks for AWS, GCP, Azure, and Kubernetes.

dashboards.name: Kubernetes Dashboard
dashboards.description: Kubernetes cluster security with pod-level visibility and container threat detection.

dashboards.name: Entity Analytics
dashboards.description: Entity risk scores, anomaly detection, host and user behavioral analytics.

dashboards.name: Data Quality
dashboards.description: Data quality monitoring for security indices including field mapping issues, incompatible fields, and index health.

dashboards.name: Cloud Native Vulnerability Management
dashboards.description: Cloud infrastructure vulnerability scanning results and remediation tracking.

dashboards.name: Detection Rule Monitoring
dashboards.description: Rule execution health, performance, and failure monitoring across all Kibana spaces.

dashboards.name: Endpoint Detection and Response
dashboards.description: Endpoint protection analytics including detections, preventions, ransomware alerts, and MITRE technique coverage from Elastic Defend.

components.title: Open Alerts by Top 10 MITRE Technique

dashboards.name: AWS CloudTrail
dashboards.description: CloudTrail log events and insight events for AWS API activity monitoring.

dashboards.name: Amazon GuardDuty
dashboards.description: GuardDuty findings visualization with severity distribution and threat type analysis.

dashboards.name: AWS Security Hub
dashboards.description: Aggregated security findings from multiple AWS security services.

dashboards.name: AWS WAF
dashboards.description: WAF Web ACL traffic analysis including blocked requests, rule matches, and geographic attack patterns.
log_types: AWS WAF Web ACL traffic information
AWS WAF Classic Web ACL traffic information

dashboards.name: Amazon VPC Flow Logs
dashboards.description: VPC Flow Logs analysis with traffic patterns, rejected connections, and network anomalies.

dashboards.name: Amazon CloudFront
dashboards.description: CloudFront access log analysis with cache hit ratios, error rates, and traffic patterns.

dashboards.name: Amazon Route 53 Resolver
dashboards.description: VPC DNS query logging for detecting DNS-based threats and anomalous resolutions.

dashboards.name: Elastic Load Balancing
dashboards.description: Load balancer access logs with latency, error rates, and backend health analysis.

dashboards.name: AWS Network Firewall
dashboards.description: Network Firewall flow and alert log analysis for network-level threat detection.

dashboards.name: S3 Access Log
dashboards.description: S3 bucket access patterns, unauthorized access attempts, and data exfiltration indicators.

dashboards.name: Amazon RDS
dashboards.description: RDS database audit and slow query analysis across Aurora, MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MariaDB.

dashboards.name: AWS Config
dashboards.description: AWS Config rules evaluation, configuration change tracking, and compliance monitoring.

dashboards.name: Amazon Inspector
dashboards.description: Inspector vulnerability findings with severity distribution and affected resource tracking.

dashboards.name: Web Server
dashboards.description: Apache/NGINX web server access and error log analysis.

dashboards.name: AWS Client VPN
dashboards.description: Client VPN connection log analysis for remote access monitoring.

dashboards.name: OpenSearch Service Metrics
dashboards.description: OpenSearch index metrics for SIEM health monitoring, shard optimization, and performance tuning.

dashboards.name: Amazon WorkSpaces
dashboards.description: WorkSpaces event and inventory monitoring for virtual desktop security.

stat_card.description: Single metric display with optional trend indicator

histogram.description: Time-series bar chart with stacking support

table.description: Tabular data display with sorting and pagination

interaction_types.click_to_filter: Clicking element applies filter to all dashboard components
interaction_types.open_in_lens: Open in Kibana Lens for customization
interaction_types.investigate_in_timeline: Open data in Timeline investigation tool
interaction_types.explore_in_discover: Open in Discover for raw data exploration
